reviews_list.review_title: Non good for studies at all.

review_content.Placements: Placements in our college are very bad. None of the companies are visiting the campus for 4 years. I am much disappointed with the placement cell of our group. Students are not able to get an internship from our college. None of the students got placements from our college.

There is no separate library, and there is no proper sitting arrangement on the campus. Our college boundaries are in bad condition. Everything on the campus is bad.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: I am disappointed with the infrastructure and placements of our college.

review_content.Placements: Placements in our college were very poor. Not even a single student got placed from our batch. None of the companies are visiting the campus since 3-4 years. I am very disappointed with the placement graph of our college. Students are not able to get a good internship from college.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college was very bad. There were no good facilities provided for students. College boundaries are in bad conditions, and washrooms are dirty. Even the sports ground is not good. There was no proper sitting arrangements on campus. Wi-Fi was not provided. There were no separate labs and library. Everything on the campus was the worst.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Science (B.Sc.) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Our college provides average infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: Our college does not provide placements for undergraduate students. Students should complete the post-graduation to apply for placements. Students from MBA and M.Sc courses got placed in companies like Tata, etc. The highest salary package offered is around 4 LPA - 5 LPA. The average salary package offered is around 2 LPA - 3 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is not sufficient, but the student union has been working to improve it since the previous year's election. Our college doesn't have its hostel and mess.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Science (B.Sc.) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: I think college is good for people who want jobs after graduation.

review_content.Placements: In the placement scenario, PG college Rishikesh is the worst for B.Sc. students.  I heard that if there is placement for B.Sc. students, the job profile will be lab assistant in the college. But you can do a master's and a bachelor's from another good college to secure the jobs. Also, if anyone has a technical skill, it will be a bonus.
review_content.Infrastructure: In terms of classrooms, they are not well maintained and are also in poor condition. Labs are also not hygienic, but the physics lab is okay. The Wi-Fi facility gives you 50 MB, which is not a plus. The canteen is not available; you have to go outside. Sports are also not good in the college because there is no trainer. Furthermore, the hostel is on the side of the main market, which is a plus, but students living there are addicted.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Science (B.Sc.) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Fully dissatisfied with bsc course

review_content.Placements: Honest there are no strong placement scenario at this college, but if you try you will get job if you have a skill.Furthermore jobs will be provided for the position of helper,assistant professor and lab assistant. Hardly I hear the placement of this college but principal says there is placement in the college it is for master students or students who pursue yoga course there
review_content.Infrastructure: Poor infrastructure, wifi limit 50mb and labs providing wifi are private and labs are very poor , Library also have limit we cannot go to read the books in the library still we have to issue it(only two at a time).Hostel is in good location at valuable price but student who live their are addicted very badly it is hard to say. Classroom are not hosted for bsc student regularly if hosted most profesor can't complete course on time.

reviews_list.batch_info: BHMS - Bachelor of Homeopathic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: The college has good faculty but is dissatisfied with the infrastructure, the course is really good.

review_content.Placements: As it is a medical college, placements don't play a significant role, and no placements are done here. The college provides only an internship period of one year. The highest package was 19 lacs, and the lowest was 10 lacs throughout the course. All the students passing the final year enter the internship.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is quite small. The library is been provided with relevant books. Hostel facilities can be improved with proper food facilities and sanitation should be improved. Sports day meet exists once per year. Annual days and extra curriculum are also present throughout the year.

The highest package was 19 lacs, and the lowest was 10 lacs throughout the course. All the students passing the final year enter the internship.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is quite small. The library is been provided with relevant books. Hostel facilities can be improved with proper food facilities and sanitation should be improved. Sports day meet exists once per year. Annual days and extra curriculum are also present throughout the year.

college_info.college_name: Bharat Ratna Late Shri Atal Bihari Vajpayee Memorial Govt Medical College, Rajnandgaon: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Cutoff, Reviews

highlights.summary:
The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

Here are some additional updates regarding the Bharat Ratna Late Shri Atal Bihari Vajpayee Memorial Govt Medical College, Rajnandgaon:

reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college that provides good facilities at low fees.

review_content.Placements: Since it is a medical college, our college does not provide placements and salary packages. Students can easily work as government medical officers after completing their degrees. Internships are compulsorily provided for all students in government hospitals to gain experience in this field. The role offered in internships is a junior doctor as per hospital authorities.
review_content.Infrastructure: All the facilities provided on our campus are good. Classrooms are air-conditioned and well-lighted with all the modern teaching amenities. Smart teaching technology is provided. Library is well stocked with around 40,000 to 50,000 books. All the labs are well-furnished. Medical equipment is available for the best experience and learning for budding doctors. Hostel facility is good and one room is shared by two people. Food served in the canteen is above average. Since it is a medical college, medical facilities are very good with over 200 beds. There are fields for various games like football, volleyball, basketball, and indoor games like table tennis.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: All about this college is good? You must admission for your future studies .

review_content.Placements: In my college, around 40% students are studying in Same course in 2022. The lowest package around 40,000 & the highest package 1,50000 something. There are many companies but some most popular companies, mam kind India, D.Pharma Apollo etc. Are Recruiting. Around 70 to 80 % students got internship in government hospital. The conclusion is the college & course is good not best?
review_content.Infrastructure: The college also provide hostel facility with good, place, &:food & atmosphere is also good for study. There is a big library for study, in library many books available as you want study, A hostel also provide good medical facilities for an case & The cantin is also good .

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Government Medical College, Rajnandgaon.

review_content.Placements: We have around 125 students in this batch. They provide salary packages after completing the course. Everyone has to do an internship for 1 year. You will get a monthly stipend of Rs. 12,500, and after that, you will get a post of a medical officer where starting salary ranges from Rs.45,000 - Rs.65,000 per month. It depends on the area you serve. Everyone gets an internship as it is compulsory.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have 4 boys' hostels and 4 girls' hostels. Each has 2 UG, 1 intern, and 1 JR. The mess facility is available in all hostels. Wi-Fi facility is available in all hostels. Our college has 4 lecture halls. Classrooms are equipped with air-conditioners. The food served in the mess is good. Our college provides 2 playgrounds for sports. We have a badminton court.

review_summary.college_name: Bharat Ratna Late Shri Atal Bihari Vajpayee Memorial Govt Medical College, Rajnandgaon Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college that provides good facilities at low fees.

content.Placements: Since it is a medical college, our college does not provide placements and salary packages. Students can easily work as government medical officers after completing their degrees. Internships are compulsorily provided for all students in government hospitals to gain experience in this field. The role offered in internships is a junior doctor as per hospital authorities.
content.Infrastructure: All the facilities provided on our campus are good. Classrooms are air-conditioned and well-lighted with all the modern teaching amenities. Smart teaching technology is provided. Library is well stocked with around 40,000 to 50,000 books. All the labs are well-furnished. Medical equipment is available for the best experience and learning for budding doctors. Hostel facility is good and one room is shared by two people. Food served in the canteen is above average. Since it is a medical college, medical facilities are very good with over 200 beds. There are fields for various games like football, volleyball, basketball, and indoor games like table tennis.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: All about this college is good? You must admission for your future studies .

content.Placements: In my college, around 40% students are studying in Same course in 2022. The lowest package around 40,000 & the highest package 1,50000 something. There are many companies but some most popular companies, mam kind India, D.Pharma Apollo etc. Are Recruiting. Around 70 to 80 % students got internship in government hospital. The conclusion is the college & course is good not best?
content.Infrastructure: The college also provide hostel facility with good, place, &:food & atmosphere is also good for study. There is a big library for study, in library many books available as you want study, A hostel also provide good medical facilities for an case & The cantin is also good .

It depends on the area you serve. Everyone gets an internship as it is compulsory.
content.Infrastructure: We have 4 boys' hostels and 4 girls' hostels. Each has 2 UG, 1 intern, and 1 JR. The mess facility is available in all hostels. Wi-Fi facility is available in all hostels. Our college has 4 lecture halls. Classrooms are equipped with air-conditioners. The food served in the mess is good. Our college provides 2 playgrounds for sports. We have a badminton court.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied with this college.

review_content.Placements: It is different in medical colleges. You need to pass NEET PG to get admission. In short, your placement (PG college) solely depends on your scores and your reservation category, which helps a lot. An internship is compulsory at your own college; that is fun.
review_content.Infrastructure: The food quality is poor. The library is good. The hostel is good. The restrooms are not up to normal standards. PG hostels are way better than UG hostels. The ground-floor library has good AC. The library has computers that can be used. The second-floor library is where interns and doctors study.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: The infrastructure is good; hostel facilities are average. Academic satisfaction is good.

review_content.Placements: After completion of the course, you have to complete a 1-year internship, and you will receive a stipend of INR 18200 per month. And during that time, you can prepare for the PG entrance examination. You can also apply for the post of JR after completion of MBBS. And you have to do compulsory bond duty for one year.
review_content.Infrastructure: The food quality is average in the mess, but you can eat in front of the college. The college infrastructure is good and started in 2015. The PG hostel is good with personal washrooms (new batches are given a stay in the PG hostel). The UG hostel washrooms are not good, but the rooms are good. The canteen is good. The library is also good. There is also a library with computers. Reading rooms are also good. The gym contains two table tennis tables. Gym equipment, cloud Bluetooth speakers, etc. are all working properly.

content.Placements: In MBBS, each student has to do the internship at their own college. So every student studying here at this college has to do their internship compulsory. So all 100% of students do their internship. The stipend is 28 thousand rupees per month. We get nice patient exposure in the internship.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is quite nice and spacious. The campus is not so large, but it is nice. There is no Wi-Fi facility. The labs are well-equipped, and the library has many books. The canteen food is very good, but the mess food is not very impressive.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Really good campus infrastructure and surrounding environment.

content.Placements: A batch of 150 students in the year 2017 started their MBBS course, admitted on merit via the NEET UG examination. A course is spread over the duration of 5.5 years, including 1 year of internship, which is allotted in the Civil Hospital, Himmatnagar, which is on the campus itself. An internship is offered once the student clears his final-year university exam. The internship stipend provided is INR 2 Lacs 18 thousand per year. Once the internship ends, students have to apply for registration at their university and then at the state council to get their MBBS graduate degree. For postgraduate courses, the National Medical Council of India conducts the All India PG Entrance Exam (NEET PG).

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with this college.

content.Placements: It is different in medical colleges. You need to pass NEET PG to get admission. In short, your placement (PG college) solely depends on your scores and your reservation category, which helps a lot. An internship is compulsory at your own college; that is fun.
content.Infrastructure: The food quality is poor. The library is good. The hostel is good. The restrooms are not up to normal standards. PG hostels are way better than UG hostels. The ground-floor library has good AC. The library has computers that can be used. The second-floor library is where interns and doctors study.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: The infrastructure is good; hostel facilities are average. Academic satisfaction is good.

content.Placements: After completion of the course, you have to complete a 1-year internship, and you will receive a stipend of INR 18200 per month. And during that time, you can prepare for the PG entrance examination. You can also apply for the post of JR after completion of MBBS. And you have to do compulsory bond duty for one year.
content.Infrastructure: The food quality is average in the mess, but you can eat in front of the college. The college infrastructure is good and started in 2015. The PG hostel is good with personal washrooms (new batches are given a stay in the PG hostel). The UG hostel washrooms are not good, but the rooms are good. The canteen is good. The library is also good. There is also a library with computers. Reading rooms are also good. The gym contains two table tennis tables. Gym equipment, cloud Bluetooth speakers, etc. are all working properly.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college for a good career.

content.Placements: Around 90% of students get placed in our course. The highest salary package offered is 10 LPA and the lowest salary package is 7 LPA. Top recruitment is provided by private hospitals. Some students don't opt for placements and go for higher studies.
content.Infrastructure: Library of our college is good. Hostel rooms are very good and it serves good food. Labs and playground are good. Many facilities are available outside the campus for food and other things. Connectivity facility of our college is satisfying. All the floors in the college have water coolers, etc.

reviews.review_heading: It is an amazing college if you are aiming to become a doctor.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is awesome It's not that old. It might only be 5 years old. In the hostel, you can never expect 5-star hotel service. It's fine if you know how to manage. Hostel food will always be a question. But you have many options around here for tiffin services.

review_summary.college_name: Gondwana University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Poor faculty despite good infrastructure.

content.Placements: Many students in my class, about 60% of the students, are placed so far. The highest package last seen in 2014 was about 14.5 LPA, and the average, the lowest, is about 4 LPA. Wipro, Microsoft, and L&T are the top recruiting companies in my college. Almost all of the students got internships in companies like Nvidia Graphics, Oracle, etc. Data Analyst, Data Scientist, Full Stack Developer and Tester are the top roles offered in my course.
content.Infrastructure: There are labs provided by the college for each department, and there are regular maintenance calls for device care. There are smartboards available in each class for quality education, and each department has a separate block/building for research purposes. The library was renovated last year, and it has an extended variety of books. In the hostel, each room is provided with good electricity. There is a water shortage, and there are common bathrooms, so this is a bit uncomfortable for most of the students. The food quality is also low in the hostel, and there is almost no maintenance for the food in the hostel mess.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Science (B.Sc.) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Faculty members are satisfied with the good infrastructure.

content.Placements: The college doesn't provide placements. The college organise an internship programme that's good and well-offered.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are good, labs are okay, there is no Wi-Fi, and the hostel facility is not good. The college organizes sports and games. The canteen is average.
content.Faculty: Good teachers, qualified teaching staff, and knowledgeable. The quality is good. The difficulty level in semester exams at the college is good, and the passing percentage is good. I don't know about the exact pass percentage.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Faculty is good and helpful.

Its not a big college, so you cant expect much from them either but got 1 internship from a connection of the college.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Instrumentation Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The college provides very good facilities that improve students' performance.

content.Placements: College placements are good in the current situation. A number of companies visit the college, and students are capable of getting placed. The highest package is 6.5 LPA, and the average is 4.5 LPA. The main role in my course is Automation Engineer in the field of instrumentation engineering.
content.Infrastructure: The college campus is very good. A number of departments are present, and their facilities are excellent. Classrooms are clean and under CCTV surveillance. The hostel is very big and very clean. Parking is available in the hostel. Rooms are cleaned by the housekeepers, and the hostel area is maintained. There is a mess in the hostel for students, and it is very affordable.

courses_data.description: Gondwana University offers a two-year full-time MBA programme at the PG level. The course is spread across four semesters. During the fourth semester, students are required to choose a specialisation as an elective. The specialisations available are Consumer Buying Behavior & Integrated Marketing Communications, Advanced Marketing Techniques, Rural Marketing, etc. Candidates after completing graduation are eligible to apply for the MBA programme.

faqs.question: What is the selection process for MBA at Gondwana University?
faqs.answer: Gondwana University selects candidates for MBA programme based on MAH CET, CAT, MAT, XAT, CMAT, GMAT or ATMA scores. Once aspirants have appeared for any of the accepted entrance exams, they need to register for DTE Maharashtra CAP rounds for seat allotment. In case of vacancy, aspirants can apply for institute-level admission by filling out the form available on the official website of the university.

faqs.question: What is the seat intake for MBA at Gondwana University?

faqs.question: Can I join Gondwana University directly?
faqs.answer: Gondwana University may provide direct admission to second year of a few programme. However, the regular admission is entrance or merit-based. The university considers entrance exams such as MAH CET, MHT CET, CAT, MAT, etc. for admission to specific programmes. Once selected, aspirants need to participate in counselling and seat allotment round for final admission.

faqs.question: How can candidates join Gondwana University?
faqs.answer: Gondwana University offers admission based on MHT CET, MAH CET, CAT, MAT, etc. for admission to specific courses. For courses such as BCA, BCom, BBA, MCom, etc., the selection is based on merit of the candidates in the last qualifying exam. Once selected, aspirants need to participate in CAP or university counselling for seat allotment. Shortlisted aspirants further need to pay the course fee to confirm their seat in the university.

faqs.question: Are admissions at Gondwana University entrance-based or merit-based?
faqs.answer: Gondwana University admissions are both merit and entrance-based. The university considers entrance exams such as MAH CET, MHT CET, CAT, MAT, JEE Main, etc. for admission to BE, MBA, BPharm and other courses. The merit of the aspirants in the last qualifying exam is considered for BCom, MCom, BCA, BBA, etc. Once selected, the university releases a merit list on the university website.

faqs.question: Can I apply for admission to various courses at Gondwana University with 50% in Class 12?
faqs.answer: Candidates who have passed Class 12 can apply for any of the UG programmes offered at Gondwana University. The university has not specified the minimum aggregate for UG programmes. However,  50% in Class 12 is an average score and aspirants can apply with this score for UG admission. The university may consider entrance exam score along with eligibility for a few UG programmes.

placement_data.title: Gondwana University Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: The University has not released the 2023 placement details. However, the NIRF report 2023 is out. According to the report, 15 PG (2-year) students were placed during Gondwana University placements 2022. The median package offered to PG (2-year) students was INR 1.80 LPA .

tables.context: How are the placements at Gondwana University?

faqs.question: How are the placements at Gondwana University?
faqs.answer: The official placement report is yet to be released. However, the University has released the NIRF report 2023 which incorporates the 2022 placement data for PG (2-year) courses. Check the below table for complete insights into Gondwana University placements 2022: Particulars PG (2-year) Placement Statistics (2022) Total students 241 Students placed 15 Median package INR 1.80 LPA NOTE: The aforementioned details are fetched from the NIRF report 2023.

faqs.question: Is Gondwana University good for placements?
faqs.answer: The placement record of Gondwana University is decent. According to the NIRF report 2023, 65% of PG (2 years) students were placed in the 2022 placement season. The median package offered was INR 1.80 LPA. Here are some of the companies that have visited Gondwana University for placements in recent years * TCS * Infosys * Wipro * Mahindra * Adani Power * Ballarshah Paper Industry

faqs.question: How are MBA placements at Gondwana University?
faqs.answer: Around 70% of the students got placed through Gondwana University placements. Internship opportunities are also provided to students. Companies like Infosys, Cognizant, IBM, Tech Mahindra, Wipro, etc., visited the campus with a higher package of INR 10 LPA and an average package of INR 4 LPA. Its Placement Cell helps students attain jobs after completing their respective courses. The objective of the college is to provide industrial exposure in the respective field the student chooses to pursue after graduation. The students of Gondwana University get internships in different companies like ICICI, Axis, ACC cement, etc. The top roles offered were in the field of Sales, Marketing, etc. The highest stipend offered was around INR 25,000 per month, and the average stipend was INR 10,000 per month.

reviews.review_heading: Poor faculty despite good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: There are labs provided by the college for each department, and there are regular maintenance calls for device care. There are smartboards available in each class for quality education, and each department has a separate block/building for research purposes. The library was renovated last year, and it has an extended variety of books. In the hostel, each room is provided with good electricity. There is a water shortage, and there are common bathrooms, so this is a bit uncomfortable for most of t...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2022Offered by Nevjabai Hitkarini CollegeReviewed on 11 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Faculty members are satisfied with the good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are good, labs are okay, there is no Wi-Fi, and the hostel facility is not good. The college organizes sports and games. The canteen is average.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Gyanodaya B.Ed and D.Ed CollegeReviewed on 1 Jan 2026)
reviews.review_heading: Faculty is good and helpful.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is okay not like good. College provide 2 labs, 1 with working computers but low Wi-Fi latency and the other with non working computers but great Wi-Fi latency. College have water filters, a canteen, a small ground, a event hall, and events.

reviews.review_heading: It has really good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are well-maintained for us. Bike parking, car parking, Wi-Fi, lab, and classrooms are provided to monitor high performance and are connecting the campus. Mess quality and canteen are good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Government College of Engineering, ChandrapurReviewed on 1 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The college provides very good facilities that improve students' performance.
reviews.review_text: The college campus is very good. A number of departments are present, and their facilities are excellent. Classrooms are clean and under CCTV surveillance. The hostel is very big and very clean. Parking is available in the hostel. Rooms are cleaned by the housekeepers, and the hostel area is maintained. There is a mess in the hostel for students, and it is very affordable.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Government College of Engineering, ChandrapurReviewed on 1 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good placements from last year.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not very good, but Wi-Fi is available in all departments and the library. Students can use the college library till 9 PM for their studies. The hostel is nice compared to other government colleges. The mess is not provided by the college. We need to pay for it separately.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Government College of Engineering, ChandrapurReviewed on 1 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The college has experienced faculty and a decent college life.
reviews.review_text: The college has all the required facilities like Wi-Fi and a hostel. It mainly provides 6 branches. Based on my experience, the core branches have an upper hand in this college. The college has Mechanical, Electrical, Computer Science, Instrumentation, and Civil branches.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Sardar Patel Mahavidyalaya ,ChandrapurReviewed on 2 Mar 2025)
reviews.review_heading: know about Sardar Patel College in Chandrapur.
reviews.review_text: The structure of the college is at a good level, and the canteen, labs, and libraries are well-facilitated. There are many kinds of books available for studying, and we also have a computer science library for practice. The labs are fully equipped, and Wi-Fi is available in both the labs and the college campus.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Sardar Patel Mahavidyalaya ,ChandrapurReviewed on 27 Feb 2025)
reviews.review_heading: My college story with my experience.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is only for girls, not for boys so I can't explain. There should be a hostel for boys also. Our department was renovated last month. Now, it is very good for studying. The library is also big. There are two libraries. All books are very well-arranged and they are easy to find.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Sardar Patel Mahavidyalaya ,ChandrapurReviewed on 4 Feb 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Know about my college and see what I've shared.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is good according to the fees. Wi-Fi is available in the labs, it is clean and computers are available. Classrooms are good for studying. There is a library which is full of books, both related to the course and outside of the course is also available. Students can sit and study in the library, there are no restrictions.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Sardar Patel Mahavidyalaya ,ChandrapurReviewed on 19 Nov 2024)
reviews.review_heading: The only opportunity to get a relevant degree at hand.
reviews.review_text: Facilities available like labs, library, and classrooms are above average. Our college conducts inter-college sports as well as intra-college sports every year, which allows students to show their extra-curricular activities, be a part of everything and show their excellence.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Ballarpur Institute of Technology (BIT Maharashtra)
reviews.review_heading: Good decent college around the area.
reviews.review_text: The facilities in the college are average. The classrooms and labs are decent, and the Wi-Fi is good. The library is above average. The quality of everything in the college is decent, but the hostel is below average. The canteen is great, and the food is great. The food for hostelers is very basic, not good nor bad. The sports facilities are also average, but there are very few events in the college.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Government College of Engineering, ChandrapurReviewed on 12 Sep 2024)
reviews.review_heading: The college has poor infrastructure development. It doesn't have a proper road and old building.
reviews.review_text: We had a departmental library in our department building, which provides all the data that is required of us. Each room has a Wi-Fi facility and has a projector place inside. Hostel rooms are very good; each room can consist of 2 students, and all-year students can live in a hostel with a capacity of 200 students.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2022Offered by Government College of Engineering, ChandrapurReviewed on 27 Jul 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Very good college for middle-class students .
reviews.review_text: There is no WiFi in college. The library is good. Teachers are very good. The hostel needs to be renovated. And the playground is good; it's a huge one. We can play 3 to 4 sports at a time. The environment is good, surrounded by numerous plants.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Sardar Patel Mahavidyalaya ,ChandrapurReviewed on 30 Jun 2024)
reviews.review_heading: No Placements and Average Teaching .
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our department is quite good. Wi-Fi, AIR CONDITIONER, GOOD QUALITY PCs available in our labs. But in the case of classrooms, its quite disappointing because the classroom is always very dusty, and we have to clean it every day on our own. And the library of the college is quite good; you can take any book along with you; every book is available there.

review_content.Placements: Placements were not available in our college. If you have a good graduation degree, you should be able to get a good job with a little effort and a proper CV. So don't go in with hope or completely rely on the place or you will be disappointed.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure was not huge, but just enough to get proper classes and labs. There were no hostels and no proper canteens, but the medical facilities were good. There were no sports or games on campus.
review_content.Faculty: Our faculty members were good with proper knowledge and support. The course curriculum was relevant, and it helped them get industry-ready. Exams were of a good level and a little difficult if you had no prior knowledge. The passing criteria were 50% in both practical and theoretical.

college_info.college_name: S.N.D. College of Pharmacy: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Cutoff, Reviews

highlights.summary:
The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

Here are some additional updates regarding the S.N.D. College of Pharmacy:

reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied with college faculty, campus life and facilities.

review_content.Placements: Less placement in class only 8 no. Of student out of 55 placed. The highest salary is 35k and the lowest is 12k. At 35k salary 4 student placed in cipla as a pharmacist. In our class mostly we get internships top internship is by lupin at role of trainee research, stipend is 12k/Month. Placement is not good for our batch.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college infrastructure is good but campus is in compact in size, free internet LAN able available in labs, library has huge collection of books but it has to renew after 15 days. Hostel rooms are less specious but facilities are good. Mess food is not good, medical first aid kit available in every floor of building. Sports and games organized in cultural event.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: About SND College of Pharmacy.

review_content.Placements: Placement of college is average, few in us place by college but most of place through our own. Cipla, mankind are top recruiters. Average package is 3lpa, 30 out of 60 get at least one internship in companies based of Nashik. Top role offered is pharmacist, Technician.
review_content.Infrastructure: College facilities of library is good, labs have all element and working condition, Wi-Fi available in labs only. Hostel facility is good but most of us stayed in rented room because it has more specious rooms than hostel, hostel mess food is best, for sports there is playground in campus.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Pharmacy (D.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: My college is the best college in this district because we have good teachers and good students.

review_content.Placements: The lowest package is 4 LPA and the highest is 12 LPA. I think this is the best package for every student because the competition is very high. So, I believe it is a very good package.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have a beautiful garden, medical facilities, a hostel, and good, healthy food. Labs have free Wi-Fi. It is the best college for medical students. SND College has a very big campus, and it is very clean and accessible. Our security team is very friendly, and everyone is very nice.
review_content.Faculty: The syllabus is hard, but our teachers are very knowledgeable, so we get good percentages in the annual exams. I trust my college to make good students and good pharmacists every year. I like my college education better than that of other colleges. Most students receive an A or B grade in exams. Every student should regularly attend all classes.

content.Placements: Less placement in class only 8 no. Of student out of 55 placed. The highest salary is 35k and the lowest is 12k. At 35k salary 4 student placed in cipla as a pharmacist. In our class mostly we get internships top internship is by lupin at role of trainee research, stipend is 12k/Month. Placement is not good for our batch.
content.Infrastructure: Our college infrastructure is good but campus is in compact in size, free internet LAN able available in labs, library has huge collection of books but it has to renew after 15 days. Hostel rooms are less specious but facilities are good. Mess food is not good, medical first aid kit available in every floor of building. Sports and games organized in cultural event.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: About SND College of Pharmacy.

content.Placements: Placement of college is average, few in us place by college but most of place through our own. Cipla, mankind are top recruiters. Average package is 3lpa, 30 out of 60 get at least one internship in companies based of Nashik. Top role offered is pharmacist, Technician.
content.Infrastructure: College facilities of library is good, labs have all element and working condition, Wi-Fi available in labs only. Hostel facility is good but most of us stayed in rented room because it has more specious rooms than hostel, hostel mess food is best, for sports there is playground in campus.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Pharmacy (D.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: My college is the best college in this district because we have good teachers and good students.

content.Placements: The lowest package is 4 LPA and the highest is 12 LPA. I think this is the best package for every student because the competition is very high. So, I believe it is a very good package.
content.Infrastructure: We have a beautiful garden, medical facilities, a hostel, and good, healthy food. Labs have free Wi-Fi. It is the best college for medical students. SND College has a very big campus, and it is very clean and accessible. Our security team is very friendly, and everyone is very nice.
content.Faculty: The syllabus is hard, but our teachers are very knowledgeable, so we get good percentages in the annual exams. I trust my college to make good students and good pharmacists every year. I like my college education better than that of other colleges. Most students receive an A or B grade in exams. Every student should regularly attend all classes.

An internship is there as part of the curriculum.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostel is very good, clean, and disciplined. We have 3 sharing bedroom with good Wi-Fi. The classrooms are large and have a decent library. There is a full-time medical assistant also. Mess food is some kind of bad but can adjust. Non-veg is available weekly once.

review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel room is a 3 shared room with a bed, table, chair, shoe stand, dustbin, and room. The college and the hostel have a Wi-Fi facility. review_content.Infrastructure: The central university of Andhra Pradesh authority is running the campus in private engineering college on lease. It has a library which has less seating. WIFI is available, only computer lab is there and we have digital classrooms. Hostel rooms are good, has Wi-Fi access, mess was maintained by the private catering and quality of food is not good. There are medical facilities which are available at evening time and there are no sports and games facilities.

review_summary.college_name: Central University of Andhra Pradesh Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Applied Psychology - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: The college facilities are good enough.

content.Placements: The placement opportunities are open to students from selected departments only. Recruitment is conducted at a general level rather than for specific departments. About 60 students join this course in the first year. After completing the programme, graduates can work as consultant psychologists across various sectors.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel accommodation is shared among three students, and each room is furnished with a B.Ed study table, chair, shoe rack, and dustbin. Both the college and hostel provide Wi-Fi connectivity. The rooms are well-maintained and comfortable, though the food quality in the mess is quite poor. Medical facilities include a full-time nurse and doctors available during the daytime.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Molecular Biology - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: This is the best university for the M.Sc. in Molecular Biology course.

content.Placements: Placement at our university was excellent. Top recruiters include AstraZeneca, Syngenta Seeds, and Asian Paints. The minimum was 5 LPA, the maximum was 15, and the average package was 10 LPA. The placement training was excellent, and the college also offered internships. The top positions available were Bioinformatics Analyst, Geneticist, and others.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel life was one of the most enjoyable experiences I've ever had, and the food offered was of excellent quality. There was a 24-hour medical clinic on campus, as well as an ambulance for emergencies. When I learnt about the other universities, I was impressed with their curriculum.

admission_process.title: Central University of Andhra Pradesh Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Central University of Andhra Pradesh admission2025 is both merit and entrance-based. The college offers 33 programmes at the UG and PG levels in various fields, including Engineering, Medicine and Health Sciences, Business and Management Studies, Accounting and Commerce, Humanities and Social Sciences, Hospitality and Travel and Science, etc. The mode of study for the offered courses is full time. The institute accepts exams, such as AP PGECET, APICET, and BIEAP, for admission to some specificCentral University of Andhra Pradesh courses. For certain programmes, the college considers the merit of the last qualifying exam of candidates, ensuring a comprehensive approach to admissions. Read more details around Central University of Andhra Pradesh admission in the following article.

hostel_campus.college_name: Central University of Andhra Pradesh Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: The college facilities are good enough.
reviews.review_text: The hostel accommodation is shared among three students, and each room is furnished with a B.Ed study table, chair, shoe rack, and dustbin. Both the college and hostel provide Wi-Fi connectivity. The rooms are well-maintained and comfortable, though the food quality in the mess is quite poor. Medical facilities include a full-time nurse and doctors available during the daytime.

reviews.review_heading: This is the best university for the M.Sc. in Molecular Biology course.
reviews.review_text: Hostel life was one of the most enjoyable experiences I've ever had, and the food offered was of excellent quality. There was a 24-hour medical clinic on campus, as well as an ambulance for emergencies. When I learnt about the other universities, I was impressed with their curriculum.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best place to learn about life.
reviews.review_text: Hostel is very good, clean, and disciplined. We have 3 sharing bedroom with good Wi-Fi. The classrooms are large and have a decent library. There is a full-time medical assistant also. Mess food is some kind of bad but can adjust. Non-veg is available weekly once.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Central University of Andhra Pradesh.
reviews.review_text: The hostel room is a 3 shared room with a bed, table, chair, shoe stand, dustbin, and room. The college and the hostel have a Wi-Fi facility. The overall quality of the room is good but when it comes to mess, it is a disaster. There will be a full-time nurse available and also doctors during daytime.

reviews.review_heading: Totally unsatisfied for graduating from this University.
reviews.review_text: The central university of Andhra Pradesh authority is running the campus in private engineering college on lease. It has a library which has less seating. WIFI is available, only computer lab is there and we have digital classrooms. Hostel rooms are good, has Wi-Fi access, mess was maintained by the private catering and quality of food is not good. There are medical facilities which are available at evening time and there are no sports and games facilities.

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied with this college because of its faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides good facilities. The maintenance is not good. The food served in the mess is not good. The food served in the canteen is expensive. Medical facilities are not available in our college. Our college provides us with sports and games facilities.

reviews.review_heading: The college is affordable and satisfactory.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good, especially for RMIT and TTM departments. The classrooms are equipped with smart projectors. A huge library and Wi-Fi are available on campus. The food is provided by a private mess, but it is healthy and hygienic. Medical facilities are good, and sports grounds are developing.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, this is a good university, especially for pursuing graduation in political science.
reviews.review_text: The college has an excellent and peaceful library,  air-conditioned classrooms, hostel, mess, medical, and sports facilities. Everything is good here. The canteen is not available because the college is on a temporary campus under JNTU. Mess services are not provided by the university.

reviews.review_heading: Academically, it is best place for study.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are in good condition. Hostel, mess & medical facilities are at reasonable prices. Library contains around 3,000 books to study. There is a space for 80- 100 students for self-study. Visually impaired students are also provided with scribers which helps them a lot.

reviews.review_heading: It is better than other local colleges.
reviews.review_text: When I started the journey, it was a newly established university. There were no permanent buildings. I think it has changed now. They would provide the hostel block and every necessary thing. We had to run the mess. Canteens were available.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Central University of Andhra Pradesh.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very well developed as compared to other government-funded universities. The greenery on the campus is a sight to fall in love with. The soothing silence around the campus, with beautiful flora and fauna all around, is good. The hostels are equipped with Wi-Fi facilities. The rooms are spacious. The windows welcomed the rising sun. We have different accommodation facilities depending on the number of beds. The mess food is really hygienic and tasty. A different menu is foll...

reviews.review_heading: Review of the Central University of Andhra Pradesh.
reviews.review_text: At present there is 2 hostels one is for boys a d one is for Girls. Mess is compulsory for each and every student who taken the hostel. There will sports events will be conducted in every year. Medical facilities is just okay. Classroom labs are good. Wi-Fi access will be there whole campus.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Central University of Andhra Pradesh.
reviews.review_text: The only thing that is good on campus is the hostel life. It is a good place to explore our boredom, and it has a proper connection of Wi-Fi with a decent speed. People used to engage in sports activities and keep their time passed. The food quality in the mess is not that good.

cut_off.college_name: P. D. Hinduja Hospital & Medical Research Center Cutoff 2025: Check NEET SS Round-Wise Cutoff Ranks

description: P. D. Hinduja Hospital & Medical Research Center NEET SS cutoff 2025 is out for Round 1. The NBEMS has released the NEET SS cutoff for admission to Super Speciality courses, such as DM, DNB and MCh etc. The cutoff is available for different categories under the AI quota. For the General category students under the AI quota, the NEET SS 2025 cutoff ranged between 8 and 3487, with DNB being the highly sought-after course for admission.

P. D. Hinduja Hospital & Medical Research Center DNB cutoff 2025 ranged between 8 and 3487 for the General category under the AI quota. With a lowest cutoff rank of 8, DNB in Rheumatology turned out to be the most competitive specialisation for admission.
Students not eligible for this specialisation can also consider DNB in Paediatric Neurology with a lenient first-round cutoff rank of for admission.

highlights.summary:
The NEET MDS 2026 application process has commenced for Pandit Deendayal Upadhyay Dental College admission to the MDS course, with Mar 30, 2026, being the last date to register. Also, the NEET MDS exam 2026 is going to be held on May 2, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: I'm satisfied with the faculty and infrastructure of the college.

review_content.Placements: There are 100 students placed per year in our college. We have to do internships in our very own college. All students got internships in our course from our college and hospital. Our college fee is 230000 per year for open category students and for SC/ST category students per year.
review_content.Infrastructure: Library , computers, and classrooms are available . Library is open from 9am in morning to 11 pm in the night. Food of the mess is pretty nice. variety of dishes are available. In our college, sports , festival, and functions are arranged for engagement of the students in the campus life.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Good if one considers fees-wise.

review_content.Placements: There were 100 students per batch. The fee was INR 204,000 per year for open-category students. Students from other categories had to pay different amounts according to their category. There is not enough patient flow, so the practice opportunities are not as good compared to other colleges.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is adequate. They have made many recent improvements. The library, gym, and practical lab facilities are good. Hostel facilities are also better compared to other colleges. Mess facilities are good, and the environment around the campus is pleasant.

review_summary.college_name: Pandit Deendayal Upadhyay Dental College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Pandit Deendayal BDS: A Journey.

content.Placements: Placements are good at college. Most of the students go for higher studies in India or foreign countries. Also, internships are provided to college students in the last year, which actually deal with patients. The placement ratio is good at our dental college.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is currently developing, and the campus is good and nature-friendly. The practical labs are well-equipped and well-maintained with the availability of machinery for students. There is a facility for a hostel, and mess is provided to students inside the college campus. The mess food is really good, with a variety of menus for each different day and affordable meals.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: I'm satisfied with the faculty and infrastructure of the college.

content.Placements: There are 100 students placed per year in our college. We have to do internships in our very own college. All students got internships in our course from our college and hospital. Our college fee is 230000 per year for open category students and for SC/ST category students per year.
content.Infrastructure: Library , computers, and classrooms are available . Library is open from 9am in morning to 11 pm in the night. Food of the mess is pretty nice. variety of dishes are available. In our college, sports , festival, and functions are arranged for engagement of the students in the campus life.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Good if one considers fees-wise.

content.Placements: There were 100 students per batch. The fee was INR 204,000 per year for open-category students. Students from other categories had to pay different amounts according to their category. There is not enough patient flow, so the practice opportunities are not as good compared to other colleges.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is adequate. They have made many recent improvements. The library, gym, and practical lab facilities are good. Hostel facilities are also better compared to other colleges. Mess facilities are good, and the environment around the campus is pleasant.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Not really a good choice But if u want to u can

content.Placements: No system of placement is here, I feel the placements are mostly getting your own clinic started which you can do by yourself. There is no sort of opportunity of jobs as such given by college. Basically no placement. You have to do your own self.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of college is not that great. Not much of sports facilities but there are a few like volleyball net and table tennis table, also badminton court but is not available for all times. I guess the college do have intra College competitions where you can participate.

reviews_list.batch_info: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: The college is satisfactory and highly recommended.

review_content.Placements: About 100% of students are alloted for internships in civil and college hospital. The average salary package offered is 6 LPA and the maximum salary package depends on own skill.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is amazing and a number of patients from surrounding areas visit the hospital for treatment, especially those who are below the poverty level as the fees and charges are low. Every classroom has an e system and we can see the live surgery from OT in the classroom. The food provided in a hostel is average. All medical facilities like emergency, panchakarma, and both are available here. In fact, operations like cataracts and pterygium are also provided.

highlights.summary: The KEAM 2026 registration for admission to the BE/BTech and BPharma courses is now over. The exam for the same will be conducted from Apr 13, 2026, to Apr 25, 2026.

review_content.Placements: Almost 95% of students who passed all exams are placed. The students who completed their higher secondary with a minimum of 50% in science can apply. KEAM should be qualified. About 100% of students got an internship at many well-known hospitals. Pharmacists, drug inspectors, and professors are the top roles offered in the course.
review_content.Infrastructure: It is a Wi-Fi-free campus. College is with full facilities like a good library, a lab for each subject, internet, medical check-up, etc. The hostel is good has delicious food and is hygienic. The mess hall is provided and the canteen is also there.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: The college has good infrastructure and promotes all types of arts and sports.

review_content.Placements: Students with or above 70% were given the chance for placements in our college. They also look forward to the child's attitude, life goals. B. Pharm course promises many times of profession including hospital or clinical pharmacy to industrial placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are provided with smart class equipments like monitors and projectors. Phones are not allowed by students to use during college hours. A library facility and separate hours for students for referring books are provided. The hostel provides separate study areas for each student, a calm atmosphere, high-quality food including coffee and noon snacks. Wardens will take students to hospitals for any medical purposes and aid.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with good facilities.

review_content.Placements: Around 80% of students are placed in this course. The average salary package offered is 5 LPA – 6 LPA. About 75-80% of students get internships from our course. We have a medical college and interns are trained in our own pharmacy.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is a good library in our college. There is a Wi-Fi connection for computer labs and pharmaceutical labs in our college. There are 4 classrooms for B.Pharma students and 2 classrooms for D.Pharm students. We have wonderful hostel facilities. They serve good homely food and snacks for all students. There is a big mess hall with television facilities. We also have a canteen in our hostel. We have medical facilities. They provide games like uno, chess, ludo, snake &ladder, carrom, etc., and sports like skipping ropes, shuttle bats, etc.

highlights.summary: Mumbai University Merit List 2025 has been released, detailed by course, round, and category, for Nagindas Khandwala College admission to UG and PG courses.

placements.overview: In Nagindas Khandwala College, 1456 students admitted in year 2016-17, out of which 1061 graduated in 2018-19. From this, 57 qualified students got placed with a median salary of Rs.261259 and 196 students got selected for higher studies. In year 2017-18, 1507 students were admitted, out of which 1239 graduated in 2019-20. From this, 64 qualified students got placed with a median salary of Rs.220681 and 220 students got selected for higher studies. In Nagindas Khandwala College, 1682 students admitted in year 2018-19, out of which 1431 graduated in 2020-21. From this, 51 qualified students got placed with a median salary of Rs.218000 and 138 students got selected for higher studies.

student_insights.feedback: Offered in the final year only
Students are expected to reach out to companies themselves
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities
Very Active and resourceful, college is also involved

reviews_list.review_title: Overall I would like to say that this college has the best faculty but less infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: Placement at my college is average some students get good placements while others do not. If you work hard during your college days you can maximize your package to 5 to 6 lakhs. Otherwise you might only get 1 lakh placement and even then it is not guaranteed.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is average. It’s not very good. We don’t have proper canteen facilities, and some buildings are broken or very old. Although there are renovations, they will take some time. Overall, the infrastructure is average.

reviews_list.review_title: BAMMC offers media jobs with a great scope.

review_content.Placements: 60-90% of students got placed. It is average and I don't know much about media, journalism, advertisement, PR, digital content, and startups. 60-70% of students get internships in second year only, some do freelancing, etc. Roles offered are content, writers, social media manager, video creator, journalism, and graphic designer.
review_content.Infrastructure: Well-developed and AC are available in every room. We have library, lab, computer rooms, etc. Many more foods in the canteen are also available. Everything is reasonable, perfect, and well-furnished. We enjoy spending time in our college.

review_summary.college_name: Nagindas Khandwala College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Computer Science - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with the teaching but not with the placement.

content.Placements: At least 10 per cent of students were placed in my batch, and they also sent non-IT roles to the placement cell group. The package is up to 3.5 to 5 LPA, and they also send companies like Media.Net, Bigul, and customer support roles in the IT placement cell.
content.Infrastructure: The library is good, but no Wi-Fi is provided. I also found a couple in the library, which is disturbing. They should remove them from the library. The quality of food is good in the canteen, and the college also supports sports, in which I have taken part. Medical support is also provided by the college.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. in Psychology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Great teaching technique.

content.Placements: 80 percent of students got placed. The highest package is 8 LPA and the lowest 3 LPA. Recruiting companies are Morgan Stanley, Amazon, a hospital, etc. 90 percent of students got internships. Roles offered are counselling psychologists and many others. One of my classmates got the top placement in the criminal psychology field. I believe it is important to know all the placements they provide in college.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are mid-level not so good, at the same time not so bad. The hostels are not that great. The infrastructure is mid-level. I hope you visit once before going to the toilets, which are quite broken and dirty at times, the authorities don't take action at all.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Management Studies (B.M.S.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Overall I would like to say that this college has the best faculty but less infrastructure.

content.Placements: Placement at my college is average some students get good placements while others do not. If you work hard during your college days you can maximize your package to 5 to 6 lakhs. Otherwise you might only get 1 lakh placement and even then it is not guaranteed.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is average. It’s not very good. We don’t have proper canteen facilities, and some buildings are broken or very old. Although there are renovations, they will take some time. Overall, the infrastructure is average.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Arts in Mass Media and Communication (BAMMC) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: BAMMC offers media jobs with a great scope.

content.Placements: 60-90% of students got placed. It is average and I don't know much about media, journalism, advertisement, PR, digital content, and startups. 60-70% of students get internships in second year only, some do freelancing, etc. Roles offered are content, writers, social media manager, video creator, journalism, and graphic designer.
content.Infrastructure: Well-developed and AC are available in every room. We have library, lab, computer rooms, etc. Many more foods in the canteen are also available. Everything is reasonable, perfect, and well-furnished. We enjoy spending time in our college.

individual_reviews.course: BBA (Hons.) in Business Administration - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college for management studies.

content.Placements: I am not very aware of placements as I am still in the 3rd year of this course, but after completing the 2nd year, there are many internship opportunities, which is the best part. There are internships from different companies, including VML, Vijay Sales, and Paytm.
content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are very good and air-conditioned. There is also a good canteen facility. There is a gymkhana to play games and a library to study and be stress-free. They also take care of cleanliness across the whole campus, and there is an elevator facility for all students.

admission_process.title: Nagindas Khandwala College Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Nagindas Khandwala College admissionis based on the exam score of the aspirants. The institute accepts scores in MAH CET, Maharashtra HSC, and Mumbai University Admission. Candidates are required to fill out the application form online at the official website of Nagindas Khandwala College. The college offers programmes in Medicine and Health Sciences, Business and Management Studies, Accounting and Commerce, Design, Mass Communication and Media, Humanities and Social Sciences, Hospitality and Travel, Science, Banking and Finance and Insurance streams.
The college offers UG courses for 2 years - 3 years. For programmes at the PG level, the duration is 2 years.

The total fee ofNagindas Khandwala Collegeincludes various components, such as caution deposit, exam fee, hostel fee, etc. Aspirants have to pay the course fee at the time of admission for seat confirmation.

hostel_campus.college_name: Nagindas Khandwala College Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the teaching but not with the placement.
reviews.review_text: The library is good, but no Wi-Fi is provided. I also found a couple in the library, which is disturbing. They should remove them from the library. The quality of food is good in the canteen, and the college also supports sports, in which I have taken part. Medical support is also provided by the college.

reviews.review_heading: Great teaching technique.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are mid-level not so good, at the same time not so bad. The hostels are not that great. The infrastructure is mid-level. I hope you visit once before going to the toilets, which are quite broken and dirty at times, the authorities don't take action at all.

reviews.review_heading: Overall I would like to say that this college has the best faculty but less infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is average. It’s not very good. We don’t have proper canteen facilities, and some buildings are broken or very old. Although there are renovations, they will take some time. Overall, the infrastructure is average.

reviews.review_heading: BAMMC offers media jobs with a great scope.
reviews.review_text: Well-developed and AC are available in every room. We have library, lab, computer rooms, etc. Many more foods in the canteen are also available. Everything is reasonable, perfect, and well-furnished. We enjoy spending time in our college.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for management studies.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are very good and air-conditioned. There is also a good canteen facility. There is a gymkhana to play games and a library to study and be stress-free. They also take care of cleanliness across the whole campus, and there is an elevator facility for all students.

reviews.review_heading: My college has good infrastructure and decent placement opportunities.
reviews.review_text: My college has good infrastructure with well-equipped classrooms and modern computer lab. There is a spacious library with a wide range of books. We have high-speed internet across the campus. There are also well-maintained sports facilities. We don't have any hostel in our college.

reviews.review_heading: The development of Nagindas Khandwala College.
reviews.review_text: All classes have AC and work amazingly. We have a library which is accessible throughout the year. The canteen is great, and sports opportunities are also great. We have different sports and sports teams in our college. Wi-Fi is sadly not for students, but labs are available.

reviews.review_heading: It is an amazing experience to attend college at Nagindas Khandwala College.
reviews.review_text: The college is fully air-conditioned with a great and affordable canteen, excellent IT labs and library with all the facilities. The beautiful infrastructure surrounded by trees and plants makes it perfect. The college is well known for its large events and seminars held on campus which attract everyone.

reviews.review_heading: The Nagindas Khandwala BAF.
reviews.review_text: Nice teacher, good education. Classes and the interior of rooms could be improved. The classrooms are very shabby and not maintained. The labs are good, and the computers are nice. We don’t have Wi-Fi accessible to students. The canteen is okay, not too good, not too bad. We have game rooms too, which have chess and carrom.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the faculty and good placements in 2024 but not very great infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: There is a library and a computer lab in the college. The library has everything that a student needs to study and also a separate computer lab. The canteen is not up to the mark, and the gymkhana is also fine, which has games like chess, table tennis, and carrom.

reviews.review_heading: An awesome college to join with many fests.
reviews.review_text: All places like classrooms, a library, a sports place, a seminar hall, and conference rooms are very clean. They are enabled with high-speed internet. The quality of all these facilities is up to the mark. Our college has a canteen. It provides food at affordable rates. The quality of the food is good.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty and curriculum, vibrant campus life; needs more industry exposure and advanced tools.
reviews.review_text: The college provides well equipped computer labs with updated software reliable WiFi spacious classrooms and a comprehensive library for the B.Sc Computer Science course. Hostel facilities are comfortable with basic amenities although the food quality in the mess and canteen could improve. Medical facilities are available on campus for emergencies and there are ample space for sports and games, encouraging physical fitness and recreation for students.

reviews.review_heading: The best college in Malad.
reviews.review_text:
There is Wi-Fi available on each floor of the building. 
The classrooms are big and spacious enough to accommodate 100 to 120 students. 
There are 4 computer labs. 
A variety of food is available in vegetarian and jain options. 
There is a gymkhana also made available to the students.

reviews.review_heading: Nagindas College:  The college of dreams, the college of success.
reviews.review_text: There is no hostel yet in the college. If we talk about infrastructure, it’s super. With centrally air-conditioned rooms and Wi-Fi on all floors, with high speed, we have a well-organised lab with the latest  technology and versions. The excellent classroom has a projector and Ac

reviews.review_heading: Review of Nagindas Khandwala College.
reviews.review_text:
Classroom facilities are average. WiFi is only available in libraries. Computer labs are good. 
I will give a rating of 3 that is average, as the canteen provides a lot of varieties but the taste is average. Medical facilities are good first aid boxes, and other amenities are there. Sports are equally given importance, like football, cricket and many others. Also, indoor games like chess are promoted through various competitions.

reviews_list.review_title: Our college is one of the best colleges of the valley.

review_content.Placements: I am the student from department of home Science. I am pursuing bachelors degree in home sceince. The B.Sc. in home Science is compeled in 3 to 4 years approximately. There are total 6 semesters in this degree. Total number of students per batch is almost 40 to 45.
review_content.Infrastructure: Overall infrastructure is good. Labs are good but chairs present in the labs are too much uncomfortable and broken. There are 6 labs in our department. Every lab is good but if we talk about physical Science lab, there is shortage of accesories, som tools and acids are not available. Other labs are enough good.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) + Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Better infrastructure with better faculty.

review_content.Placements: About 5% of our batch mates got placement in various high tech companies. The minimum package was about 15k, upto 100k. individual_reviews.course: B.A in Arabic - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: College is okay in terms of infrastructure. Teachers are not that helpful.

content.Placements: There is no such thing as placements because they don't have any such facilities at the college. You have to look for the job on your own. They are there just to educate and impart the same, but not to care about the jobs. They will just prepare you for the course that you have chosen.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good, but more emphasis should be given to cleanliness in the canteens, and medical facilities should be improved. The price of food in the canteens should be reviewed and made slightly lower, and more equipment should be purchased for medical purposes.

individual_reviews.course: B.A.in Sociology - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Our college provides good infrastructure and teachers but placements are not good.

content.Placements: There were no placements in this course. Few students opted for higher studies. It was a new course so there were great opportunities for students.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms were well-maintained. There was a decent library in this college. Digital classrooms were better. Hostels were better. The food served in the mess was decent. A canteen was available. Medical facilities were provided. Sports and games were conducted in this college.
content.Faculty: Teachers were cooperative, helpful, knowledgeable, and qualified. Semester exams were easy. The passing marks were 22 out of 56. According to the new education policy, passing marks changed.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Home Science - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Our college is one of the best colleges of the valley.

content.Placements: I am the student from department of home Science. I am pursuing bachelors degree in home sceince. The B.Sc. in home Science is compeled in 3 to 4 years approximately. There are total 6 semesters in this degree. Total number of students per batch is almost 40 to 45.
content.Infrastructure: Overall infrastructure is good. Labs are good but chairs present in the labs are too much uncomfortable and broken. There are 6 labs in our department. Every lab is good but if we talk about physical Science lab, there is shortage of accesories, som tools and acids are not available. Other labs are enough good.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) + Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Better infrastructure with better faculty.

content.Placements: About 5% of our batch mates got placement in various high tech companies. The minimum package was about 15k, upto 100k. Roles of web designing, application making, coding, programming, Programing annalist, software developer, software manager & data base designer were offered.
content.Infrastructure: What I was most attracted by was the infrastructure of the college. There was every facility needed by any student. Well maintained computer labs, classrooms, libraries, gives a glimpse to the beauty. Also the hostel, medical facilities, food, sports, and games are well controlled.
