reviews.review_heading: College is okay in terms of infrastructure. Teachers are not that helpful.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good, but more emphasis should be given to cleanliness in the canteens, and medical facilities should be improved. The price of food in the canteens should be reviewed and made slightly lower, and more equipment should be purchased for medical purposes.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good infrastructure and teachers but placements are not good.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms were well-maintained. There was a decent library in this college. Digital classrooms were better. Hostels were better. The food served in the mess was decent. A canteen was available. Medical facilities were provided. Sports and games were conducted in this college.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is one of the best colleges of the valley.
reviews.review_text: Overall infrastructure is good. Labs are good but chairs present in the labs are too much uncomfortable and broken. There are 6 labs in our department. Every lab is good but if we talk about physical Science lab, there is shortage of accesories, som tools and acids are not available. Other labs are enough good.

reviews.review_heading: Better infrastructure with better faculty.
reviews.review_text: What I was most attracted by was the infrastructure of the college. There was every facility needed by any student. Well maintained computer labs, classrooms, libraries, gives a glimpse to the beauty. Also the hostel, medical facilities, food, sports, and games are well controlled.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with my college.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi facilities in the college for students. However, Classrooms and the library are very good. There are both indoor and outdoor games equipments available in the college. You can play whatever you want. The hostel facilities are available for female candidates only.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with this college because of good and educated faculty.
reviews.review_text: The college provides hostel facilities. The hostel charges very minimal charges ranging from 2,500 to 3,000. The quality of food is the best. The canteen offers a lot of food items. I haven't seen such a canteen in my life till now, with a variety of things available. Medical facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: The college has a great campus and great faculty.
reviews.review_text: Our college is equipped with decent infrastructure. The classrooms are spacious, though some maintenance is available across the campus, but it can be slow during peak hours. The library is well-stocked, quiet, and a good place to study. We also have Khyber and a mental asylum.

reviews.review_heading: This is a good college.
reviews.review_text: The college had a good ambiance and comfortable hostels. Classrooms were full of life and joy. Facilities provided in our hostel were adequate food, clean rooms, clean washrooms, and good network connectivity. Our college provided a great opportunity for a sports-related career.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied because of good faculty being around.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are not that bad but underdeveloped. The infrastructure is good but the departments lack sophisticated pieces of equipment to provide students with a good sense of practicality. As far as the hostel is concerned, being a day scholar I never explored the hostel, but it is said that it is good. The sports and games department is good and students are exploring sports pretty much well in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of the faculty as they are excellent, with a large span of experience.
reviews.review_text: The college provides all the necessary resources that a student needs during his/her college life. It has a massive architecture with large libraries having thousands of books. A sports room, Wi-Fi and spacious classrooms are available. The canteen is clean, and the food provided by the hostel is very healthy.

reviews.review_heading: The inside review of my college.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are bearable, but they could be better. The canteen food is so unhealthy, and there is no Wi-Fi available. I do not stay in the hostel, but I have heard from my friends that it is not much better. The warden is like a jail officer working there.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: The college has Wi-Fi, labs, and spacious classrooms. The hostel facilities are available in our college. Just needs to work on managing garbage and its proper disposal. The canteen doesn't remain constant and is very small for a large number of students. The libraries are well-developed and well-managed.
